description: Simon Claydon is the Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions at the Cabinet Office. Simon was previously, from June 2021 to May 2023, the Director of People, Capability and Change at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities. In a 32 year Civil Service career, Simon has held a number of other senior HR and other leadership roles, including at HM Revenue and Customs, Cabinet Office and Department of Health and Social Care.

details.body:
Simon Claydon is the Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions at the Cabinet Office.

Simon was previously, from June 2021 to May 2023, the Director of People, Capability and Change at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities.

In a 32 year Civil Service career, Simon has held a number of other senior HR and other leadership roles, including at HM Revenue and Customs, Cabinet Office and Department of Health and Social Care.

Simon Claydon is the Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions at the Cabinet Office.

Simon was previously, from June 2021 to May 2023, the Director of People, Capability and Change at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities.

In a 32 year Civil Service career, Simon has held a number of other senior HR and other leadership roles, including at HM Revenue and Customs, Cabinet Office and Department of Health and Social Care.

Working in the Government People Group, the Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions is accountable for setting the direction on a range of pay and reward issues including pensions. And leading on the central employment framework and policies for the Civil Service.

role.title: Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions

details.body:
Simon Claydon is the Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions at the Cabinet Office.

Simon was previously, from June 2021 to May 2023, the Director of People, Capability and Change at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities.

In a 32 year Civil Service career, Simon has held a number of other senior HR and other leadership roles, including at HM Revenue and Customs, Cabinet Office and Department of Health and Social Care.

The Director of People, Capability and Change leads DLUHC’s change programme, workforce strategy, pay and reward, leadership and talent management, diversity and inclusion, HR operations, recruitment, HR policy and people engagement.

The Director of People, Capability and Change leads MHCLG’s change programme, workforce strategy, pay and reward, leadership and talent management, diversity and inclusion, HR operations, recruitment, HR policy and people engagement.
